Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Alfred brush ford

Social · asked by user [] · 2010-04-04 · 4 answers
Hare Krishna,
What is the exact material post of HG Ambarish Pr (Alfred brush ford) in the Ford Company?
or has he renounced post in that company?
user [467] · 2010-04-04
He holds no post nor position in the Ford Motor Company - nor has he ever.
user [449] · 2010-04-04
Its all right!
But what is His occupation then?
I think he has directed his investment in some internet software company.
Refer:http://www.facesofphilanthropy.com/alfred-ford/
But I need more details.

Also, some temples propagate that He is the owner of Ford Motor Company. How come?
user [154] · 2010-04-04
He is involved with the interest of the Ford company, not in any directing form, more as an investor.
user [513] · 2010-04-04
As a member of the Ford family his inheritance came to him in the form of blue chip Ford stocks. He sold most of them when Ford stock began plummeting in the early 80s.

Henry Ford had a son named Edsel. Edsel had two sons and a daughter. The daughter is Alfreds mother. She just happened by chance to marry a man whose last name was also Ford which is why she remained a Ford and which is why Alfreds last name is Ford. He is related to the original Henry Ford (his great grandfather) through his mother.
